creator: wood_elf@126.com
text:
When I use portupgrade to upgrade gnome-power-manager from version 2.30.1_1 to 2.32.0, the following errors occured when the new port is installing:

gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/po'
Making install in docs
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/docs'
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/docs'
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `install-exec-am'.
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `install-data-am'.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/docs'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/docs'
Making install in man
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man'
docbook2man gnome-power-manager.sgml &> /dev/null
docbook2man gnome-power-statistics.sgml &> /dev/null
docbook2man gnome-power-preferences.sgml &> /dev/null
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man'
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `install-exec-am'.
docbook2man gnome-power-manager.sgml &> /dev/null
docbook2man gnome-power-statistics.sgml &> /dev/null
docbook2man gnome-power-preferences.sgml &> /dev/null
test -z "/usr/local/man/man1" || /usr/local/bin/gmkdir -p "/usr/local/man/man1"
Using catalogs: /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog
Using stylesheet: /usr/local/share/sgml/docbook/utils-0.6.14/docbook-utils.dsl#print
Working on: /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man/gnome-power-manager.sgml
Using catalogs: /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog
Using stylesheet: /usr/local/share/sgml/docbook/utils-0.6.14/docbook-utils.dsl#print
Working on: /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man/gnome-power-preferences.sgml
 install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 ./gnome-power-manager.1 ./gnome-power-statistics.1 ./gnome-power-preferences.1 '/usr/local/man/man1'
install: ./gnome-power-manager.1: No such file or directory
gmake[2]: *** [install-man1] error 71
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man'
Using catalogs: /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog
gmake[1]: Using stylesheet: /usr/local/share/sgml/docbook/utils-0.6.14/docbook-utils.dsl#print
*** [install-am] error 2Working on: /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man/gnome-power-manager.sgml

gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager/work/gnome-power-manager-2.32.0/man'
gmake: *** [install-recursive] error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/gnome-power-manager.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20101128-55764-3lqsio-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=gnome-power-manager-2.30.1_1 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=2.30.1_1 make reinstall

Is there some problem with man pages of the work directory? Please give some help. 
Thank you all.
